evidence: Responsibility-atom importer built + Chiway seeded; the full 14-spec workflow then ran to completion. Real seed: 444 atoms, 0 errors; every one of the 16 divisions (incl. the new IT) + all positions has >=1 atom; Director of IT created (FGAP-016 + FGAP-017 data-curated). Importer: adversarial audit Total findings: 0; idempotent (2nd run 0 created) + dry-run writes nothing; full gate green (ruff+format, mypy . 322/0, pytest 2025, make test-js 48/0). Run workshop-run-plan-sequence-20260607-092307-0c56: status completed, all 42 steps; propose-responsibilities (spec 7) applied (each of the 6 action steps carries responsibilities), and every downstream spec cleared -- the first complete accumulated whole-plan draft (4 milestones, 6 criteria, 6 action steps, 6 channels, 11 standards, 18 communications, 7 review events, 8 revision rules; 24 soft-flags surfaced for review, none hard).

criteria_results.criterion: After the seed, every division and every position for the tenant has at least one responsibility atom.
The agreed atom set is present at the correct owners.
The importer is idempotent and supports a dry-run that writes nothing.
The full project gate stays green.
Re-running the workflow advances past the propose-responsibilities spec.
